However, the majority of current robot learning datasets and benchmarks mainly focus on stationary robot arms, and the few existing humanoid datasets are either confined to fixed environments or limited in task diversity, often lacking human-humanoid interaction and lower-body locomotion. Moreover, there are a few standardized evaluation platforms for benchmarking learning-based policies on humanoid data. For standardized evaluation, we introduce a cloud-based evaluation platform that allows researchers to seamlessly deploy their policies in our controlled setting and receive performance feedback. By releasing Humanoid Everyday along with our policy learning analysis and a standardized cloud-based evaluation platform, we intend to advance research in general-purpose humanoid manipulation and lay the groundwork for more capable and embodied robotic agents in real-world scenarios. They evaluate the kindness of others' actions not only by monitoring the outcomes but also by considering the intentions. This behavioral concept can be adapted to train cooperative agents in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). We propose the KindMARL method, where agents' intentions are measured by counterfactual reasoning over the environmental impact of the actions that were available to the agents. More specifically, the current environment state is compared with the estimation of the current environment state provided that the agent had chosen another action. The difference between each agent's reward, as the outcome of its action, with that of its fellow, multiplied by the intention of the fellow is then taken as the fellow's "kindness". Practitioners frequently tend to study or compare MARL algorithms from a qualitative perspective largely due to the inherent stochasticity in practical algorithms arising from random dithering exploration strategies, environment transition noise, and stochastic gradient updates to name a few. Traditional analytical approaches, such as replicator dynamics, often rely on mean-field approximations to remove stochastic effects, but this simplification, whilst able to provide general overall trends, might lead to dissonance between analytical predictions and actual realisations of individual trajectories. In this paper, we propose a novel perspective on MARL systems by modelling them as \textit{coupled stochastic dynamical systems}, capturing both agent interactions and environmental characteristics. Leveraging tools from dynamical systems theory, we analyse the stability and sensitivity of agent behaviour at individual level, which are key dimensions for their practical deployments, for example, in presence of strict safety requirements. This framework allows us, for the first time, to rigorously study MARL dynamics taking into consideration their inherent stochasticity, providing a deeper understanding of system behaviour and practical insights for the design and control of multi-agent learning processes. 🧠 核心术语库 🔬 核心方法简述 首次运行分析失败，暂无法生成方法论 💬 锐评 首次运行分析失败，暂无法生成锐评 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MultiAgent_Game_Theory.full_note: Online Decision-Making Under Uncertainty for Vehicle-to-Building Systems 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MultiAgent_Game_Theory 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.03476v1 🧾 一句话总结： 首次运行分析失败，建议后续补充。 📄 摘要： Vehicle-to-building (V2B) systems integrate physical infrastructures, such as smart buildings and electric vehicles (EVs) connected to chargers at the building, with digital control mechanisms to manage energy use. By utilizing EVs as flexible energy reservoirs, buildings can dynamically charge and discharge them to optimize energy use and cut costs under time-variable pricing and demand charge policies. This setup leads to the V2B optimization problem, where buildings coordinate EV charging and discharging to minimize total electricity costs while meeting users' charging requirements. However, the V2B optimization problem is challenging because of: (1) fluctuating electricity pricing, which includes both energy charges ($/kWh) and demand charges ($/kW); (2) long planning horizons (typically over 30 days); (3) heterogeneous chargers with varying charging rates, controllability, and directionality (i.e., unidirectional or bidirectional); and (4) user-specific battery levels at departure to ensure user requirements are met. In contrast to existing approaches that often model this setting as a single-shot combinatorial optimization problem, we highlight critical limitations in prior work and instead model the V2B optimization problem as a Markov decision process (MDP), i.e., a stochastic control process. Solving the resulting MDP is challenging due to the large state and action spaces. To address the challenges of the large state space, we leverage online search, and we counter the action space by using domain-specific heuristics to prune unpromising actions. We validate our approach in collaboration with Nissan Advanced Technology Center - Silicon Valley. Using data from their EV testbed, we show that the proposed framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. 🧠 核心术语库 🔬 核心方法简述 首次运行分析失败，暂无法生成方法论 💬 锐评 首次运行分析失败，暂无法生成锐评 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MultiAgent_Game_Theory.full_note: When Personas Override Payoffs: Role Identity Bias in Multi-Agent LLM Decision-Making 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MultiAgent_Game_Theory 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.10102v2 🧾 一句话总结： 首次运行分析失败，建议后续补充。 📄 摘要： Large language models are increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems for strategic tasks, yet how design choices such as role-based personas and payoff visibility affect reasoning remains poorly understood. We investigate whether multi-agent systems function as strategic reasoners capable of payoff optimization or as identity-driven actors that prioritize role alignment over explicit incentives. Using Nash equilibrium achievement as a diagnostic for strategic reasoning, we conduct systematic experiments across four LLM architectures (Qwen-7B, Qwen-32B, Llama-8B, Mistral-7B) in complex environmental decision-making games involving four agents. We show that role identity bias fundamentally alters strategic reasoning even when payoff-optimal equilibria exist and complete payoff information is available. Removing personas and providing explicit payoffs enables Qwen models to achieve high Nash equilibrium rates, indicating that both conditions are necessary for strategic reasoning. In contrast, personas systematically bias equilibrium selection toward socially preferred outcomes: with personas present, all of the achieved equilibria correspond to Green Transition, while models entirely fail to reach equilibrium when Tragedy of the Commons is payoff-optimal. The effect of explicit payoffs depends entirely on persona presence, revealing strong interactions between representational design choices. We also observe clear model-dependent patterns. Qwen architectures are highly sensitive to both personas and payoff visibility, whereas Llama and Mistral exhibit rigid reasoning behavior across conditions. These findings demonstrate that representational choices are substantive governance decisions that determine whether multi-agent systems act as strategic reasoners or identity-driven actors, with important implications for real-world deployment. 🧠 核心术语库 🔬 核心方法简述 首次运行分析失败，暂无法生成方法论 💬 锐评 首次运行分析失败，暂无法生成锐评 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MultiAgent_Game_Theory.title: GT-HarmBench: Benchmarking AI Safety Risks Through the Lens of Game Theory
MultiAgent_Game_Theory.short_review: 该研究填补了从单智能体向多智能体安全评测的关键缺口，通过经典博弈结构将定性风险转化为定量指标，揭示了主流模型在复杂交互中高达 38% 的有害决策率；但需注意将真实风险抽象为标准博弈模型可能存在的简化偏差
MultiAgent_Game_Theory.full_note: GT-HarmBench: Benchmarking AI Safety Risks Through the Lens of Game Theory 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： MultiAgent_Game_Theory 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.12316v1 🧾 一句话总结： GT-HarmBench 首次引入博弈论视角构建多智能体安全基准，实证揭示了前沿模型在多场景下的协调失效问题，并为改善对齐提供了标准化测试床与干预依据 📄 摘要： Frontier AI systems are increasingly capable and deployed in high-stakes multi-agent environments. However, existing AI safety benchmarks largely evaluate single agents, leaving multi-agent risks such as coordination failure and conflict poorly understood. We introduce GT-HarmBench, a benchmark of 2,009 high-stakes scenarios spanning game-theoretic structures such as the Prisoner's Dilemma, Stag Hunt and Chicken. Scenarios are drawn from realistic AI risk contexts in the MIT AI Risk Repository. Across 15 frontier models, agents choose socially beneficial actions in only 62% of cases, frequently leading to harmful outcomes. We measure sensitivity to game-theoretic prompt framing and ordering, and analyze reasoning patterns driving failures. We further show that game-theoretic interventions improve socially beneficial outcomes by up to 18%. Our results highlight substantial reliability gaps and provide a broad standardized testbed for studying alignment in multi-agent environments. The benchmark and code are available at https://github.com/causalNLP/gt-harmbench. 🧠 核心术语库 [[多智能体安全风险]] [[博弈论结构]] [[AI 安全基准]] [[社会有益行动]] [[对齐差距]] 🔬 核心方法简述 基于 MIT AI Risk Repository 构建包含 2,009 个高利害场景的 GT-HarmBench 基准，涵盖囚徒困境等博弈结构；评估 15 种前沿模型在社会有益行动选择上的表现（仅 62%）；测量提示词框架敏感性与推理模式；验证博弈论干预措施可将社会有益结果提升最高 18% 💬 锐评 该研究填补了从单智能体向多智能体安全评测的关键缺口，通过经典博弈结构将定性风险转化为定量指标，揭示了主流模型在复杂交互中高达 38% 的有害决策率；但需注意将真实风险抽象为标准博弈模型可能存在的简化偏差 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MultiAgent_Game_Theory.title: Body-Reservoir Governance in Repeated Games: Embodied Decision-Making, Dynamic Sentinel Adaptation, and Complexity-Regularized Optimization
MultiAgent_Game_Theory.short_review: 理论视角极具创新性，首次尝试将博弈论从纯认知计算框架转化为物理系统的动力学稳定性问题，为解决具身智能的计算能效瓶颈提供了新范式。然而仅凭摘要可见局限：'热力学成本'的物理量化映射较抽象，KL 散度作为复杂度代价在具身环境中的普适性待验证，且对比基线多为传统经典算法（如TfT），缺乏与当代深度学习方法的横向效能评估。
MultiAgent_Game_Theory.full_note: Body-Reservoir Governance in Repeated Games: Embodied Decision-Making, Dynamic Sentinel Adaptation, and Complexity-Regularized Optimization 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： MultiAgent_Game_Theory 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.20846v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该研究重构了重复博弈中的合作本质，将其视为适应动力系统的最小耗散响应而非显式计算，并通过动态传感器机制显著降低了具身决策的物理与能耗成本。 📄 摘要： Standard game theory explains cooperation in repeated games through conditional strategies such as Tit-for-Tat (TfT), but these require continuous computation that imposes physical costs on embodied agents. We propose a three-layer Body-Reservoir Governance (BRG) architecture: (1) a body reservoir (echo state network) whose $d$-dimensional state performs implicit inference over interaction history, serving as both decision-maker and anomaly detector, (2) a cognitive filter providing costly strategic tools activated on demand, and (3) a metacognitive governance layer with receptivity parameter $α\in [0,1]$. At full body governance ($α=1$), closed-loop dynamics satisfy a self-consistency equation: cooperation is expressed as the reservoir's fixed point, not computed. Strategy complexity cost is defined as the KL divergence between the reservoir's state distribution and its habituated baseline. Body governance reduces this cost, with action variance decreasing up to $1600\times$ with dimension $d$. A dynamic sentinel generates a composite discomfort signal from the reservoir's own state, driving adaptive $α(t)$: near baseline during cooperation, rapidly dropping upon defection to activate cognitive retaliation. Overriding the body incurs thermodynamic cost proportional to internal state distortion. The sentinel achieves the highest payoff across all conditions, outperforming static body governance, TfT, and EMA baselines. A dimension sweep ($d \in \{5,\ldots,100\}$) shows implicit inference scales with bodily richness ($23\times$ to $1600\times$ variance reduction), attributable to reservoir dynamics. A phase diagram in $(d, τ_{\mathrm{env}})$ space reveals governance regime transitions near $d \approx 20$. The framework reinterprets cooperation as the minimum-dissipation response of an adapted dynamical system -- emergent from embodied dynamics rather than computed. 🧠 核心术语库 [[身体水库治理 (Body-Reservoir Governance)]] [[回声状态网络 (Echo State Network)]] [[动态哨兵 (Dynamic Sentinel)]] [[最小耗散响应 (Minimum-Dissipation Response)]] [[热力学成本 (Thermodynamic Cost)]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出三层身体水库治理（BRG）架构：(1) 基于回声状态网络的身体水库进行隐式历史推断与异常检测；(2) 按需激活的高成本认知过滤器；(3) 元认知控制层调节感知度α。通过动态哨兵生成不适信号自适应调整α，将合作定义为适应系统的固定点而非计算结果，并以KL散度定义策略复杂度成本。 💬 锐评 理论视角极具创新性，首次尝试将博弈论从纯认知计算框架转化为物理系统的动力学稳定性问题，为解决具身智能的计算能效瓶颈提供了新范式。然而仅凭摘要可见局限：'热力学成本'的物理量化映射较抽象，KL 散度作为复杂度代价在具身环境中的普适性待验证，且对比基线多为传统经典算法（如TfT），缺乏与当代深度学习方法的横向效能评估。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MultiAgent_Game_Theory.title: MO-MIX: Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Cooperative Decision-Making With Deep Reinforcement Learning
MultiAgent_Game_Theory.short_review: 摘要未明确说明方法在多目标数量变化时的扩展性，且未讨论偏好权重选择的实际影响。实证结果仅验证四类指标但未展示真实场景适配性，探索引导机制的具体实现细节缺失。
MultiAgent_Game_Theory.full_note: MO-MIX: Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Cooperative Decision-Making With Deep Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MultiAgent_Game_Theory 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00730v1 🧾 一句话总结： 首次提出融合多目标强化学习与多智能体协作的深度Q网络框架，在保持计算效率的同时实现高效帕累托前沿近似 📄 摘要： Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has been applied extensively to solve complex decision-making problems. In many real-world scenarios, tasks often have several conflicting objectives and may require multiple agents to cooperate, which are the multi-objective multi-agent decision-making problems. However, only few works have been conducted on this intersection. Existing approaches are limited to separate fields and can only handle multi-agent decision-making with a single objective, or multi-objective decision-making with a single agent. In this paper, we propose MO-MIX to solve the multi-objective multi-agent reinforcement learning (MOMARL) problem. Our approach is based on the centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) framework. A weight vector representing preference over the objectives is fed into the decentralized agent network as a condition for local action-value function estimation, while a mixing network with parallel architecture is used to estimate the joint action-value function. In addition, an exploration guide approach is applied to improve the uniformity of the final non-dominated solutions. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively solve the multi-objective multi-agent cooperative decision-making problem and generate an approximation of the Pareto set. Our approach not only significantly outperforms the baseline method in all four kinds of evaluation metrics, but also requires less computational cost. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MOMARL)]] [[Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE)]] [[Pareto set approximation]] [[Weight-conditioned action-value networks]] [[Parallel mixing network architecture]] 🔬 核心方法简述 基于CTDE框架，通过权重向量条件输入去中心化智能体网络并行估计联合动作价值函数，结合探索引导策略优化非支配解分布 💬 锐评 摘要未明确说明方法在多目标数量变化时的扩展性，且未讨论偏好权重选择的实际影响。实证结果仅验证四类指标但未展示真实场景适配性，探索引导机制的具体实现细节缺失。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Vision-Language Navigation with Random Environmental Mixup
UAV_VLN.short_review: 精准针对 VLN 任务中跨场景泛化难题，利用拓扑结构（房间连接图）指导数据增强而非简单像素混合，思路新颖且效果显著。然而，该方法强依赖于“房屋场景”及“房间连接图”的先验信息，对于缺乏明确连通性约束的复杂环境（如无人机常见的大空间室外场景）的适用性存疑。
UAV_VLN.full_note: Vision-Language Navigation with Random Environmental Mixup 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2106.07876v3 🧾 一句话总结： 提出通过随机环境混编技术生成跨场景数据，有效缓解了 VLN 代理在未见环境中的过拟合问题，提升了整体导航性能并创下基准记录。 📄 摘要： Vision-language Navigation (VLN) tasks require an agent to navigate step-by-step while perceiving the visual observations and comprehending a natural language instruction. Large data bias, which is caused by the disparity ratio between the small data scale and large navigation space, makes the VLN task challenging. Previous works have proposed various data augmentation methods to reduce data bias. However, these works do not explicitly reduce the data bias across different house scenes. Therefore, the agent would overfit to the seen scenes and achieve poor navigation performance in the unseen scenes. To tackle this problem, we propose the Random Environmental Mixup (REM) method, which generates cross-connected house scenes as augmented data via mixuping environment. Specifically, we first select key viewpoints according to the room connection graph for each scene. Then, we cross-connect the key views of different scenes to construct augmented scenes. Finally, we generate augmented instruction-path pairs in the cross-connected scenes. The experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our augmentation data via REM help the agent reduce its performance gap between the seen and unseen environment and improve the overall performance, making our model the best existing approach on the standard VLN benchmark. The code have released: https://github.com/LCFractal/VLNREM. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Vision-Language Navigation]] [[Random Environmental Mixup]] [[Data Bias]] [[Seen/Unseen Environments]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出随机环境混编（REM）方法：首先根据房间连接图选择各场景的关键视点，接着交叉连接不同场景的关键视点以构建混合环境，最后在这些混合环境中生成增强的指令 - 路径对，以此显式降低跨场景数据偏差。 💬 锐评 精准针对 VLN 任务中跨场景泛化难题，利用拓扑结构（房间连接图）指导数据增强而非简单像素混合，思路新颖且效果显著。然而，该方法强依赖于“房屋场景”及“房间连接图”的先验信息，对于缺乏明确连通性约束的复杂环境（如无人机常见的大空间室外场景）的适用性存疑。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Volumetric Environment Representation for Vision-Language Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 该工作通过显式 3D 体素化表征有效克服了传统单目框架的几何语义缺失问题，实现了基准测试上的 SOTA 成绩；然而摘要未详述体素化网格带来的计算复杂度及其对实时导航系统的影响，且多视图特征聚合在实际传感器噪声下的泛化能力尚需验证。
UAV_VLN.full_note: Volumetric Environment Representation for Vision-Language Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.14158v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该论文通过构建细粒度的体素化 3D 环境表征，显著增强了智能体对场景的理解能力，从而在视觉语言导航任务中达到了领先水平。 📄 摘要： Vision-language navigation (VLN) requires an agent to navigate through an 3D environment based on visual observations and natural language instructions. It is clear that the pivotal factor for successful navigation lies in the comprehensive scene understanding. Previous VLN agents employ monocular frameworks to extract 2D features of perspective views directly. Though straightforward, they struggle for capturing 3D geometry and semantics, leading to a partial and incomplete environment representation. To achieve a comprehensive 3D representation with fine-grained details, we introduce a Volumetric Environment Representation (VER), which voxelizes the physical world into structured 3D cells. For each cell, VER aggregates multi-view 2D features into such a unified 3D space via 2D-3D sampling. Through coarse-to-fine feature extraction and multi-task learning for VER, our agent predicts 3D occupancy, 3D room layout, and 3D bounding boxes jointly. Based on online collected VERs, our agent performs volume state estimation and builds episodic memory for predicting the next step. Experimental results show our environment representations from multi-task learning lead to evident performance gains on VLN. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance across VLN benchmarks (R2R, REVERIE, and R4R). 🧠 核心术语库 [[Volumetric Environment Representation (VER)]] [[2D-3D Feature Sampling]] [[Joint Multi-task Learning]] [[Episodic Memory]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出体素环境表示（VER），将物理世界体素化为结构化 3D 单元格。通过 2D-3D 采样聚合多视图特征至统一 3D 空间，利用粗到细特征提取与多任务学习联合预测 3D 占据、房间布局及边界框，并结合在线收集的数据构建体积状态估计与事件记忆以预测下一步动作。 💬 锐评 该工作通过显式 3D 体素化表征有效克服了传统单目框架的几何语义缺失问题，实现了基准测试上的 SOTA 成绩；然而摘要未详述体素化网格带来的计算复杂度及其对实时导航系统的影响，且多视图特征聚合在实际传感器噪声下的泛化能力尚需验证。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Instance-Level Semantic Maps for Vision Language Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 创新性地解决了传统语义地图的实例区分瓶颈，但需警惕对预训练LLM本体的依赖性与实时性开销的平衡问题
UAV_VLN.full_note: Instance-Level Semantic Maps for Vision Language Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.12363v3 🧾 一句话总结： 开创性地将LLM知识迁移至视觉导航场景，通过实例级语义映射实现现实指令下233%的导航性能提升 📄 摘要： Humans have a natural ability to perform semantic associations with the surrounding objects in the environment. This allows them to create a mental map of the environment, allowing them to navigate on-demand when given linguistic instructions. A natural goal in Vision Language Navigation (VLN) research is to impart autonomous agents with similar capabilities. Recent works take a step towards this goal by creating a semantic spatial map representation of the environment without any labeled data. However, their representations are limited for practical applicability as they do not distinguish between different instances of the same object. In this work, we address this limitation by integrating instance-level information into spatial map representation using a community detection algorithm and utilizing word ontology learned by large language models (LLMs) to perform open-set semantic associations in the mapping representation. The resulting map representation improves the navigation performance by two-fold (233%) on realistic language commands with instance-specific descriptions compared to the baseline. We validate the practicality and effectiveness of our approach through extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments. 🧠 核心术语库 [[实例级语义映射]] [[社区检测算法]] [[大型语言模型本体]] [[开放集语义关联]] 🔬 核心方法简述 通过社区检测算法整合实例级物体信息构建语义地图，结合LLM训练的词本体实现开放集语义关联映射 💬 锐评 创新性地解决了传统语义地图的实例区分瓶颈，但需警惕对预训练LLM本体的依赖性与实时性开销的平衡问题 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: MonoDream: Monocular Vision-Language Navigation with Panoramic Dreaming
UAV_VLN.short_review: 该方法试图用生成式“梦境”弥补感知缺失，但摘要未披露预测全景特征对下游导航任务的实际贡献权重，若潜空间与真实物理布局偏差过大，可能导致导航策略在复杂场景下失效
UAV_VLN.full_note: MonoDream: Monocular Vision-Language Navigation with Panoramic Dreaming 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.02549v4 🧾 一句话总结： 通过单目输入下的全景潜特征重构技术，以低成本传感器实现接近全景 RGB-D 性能的导航代理 📄 摘要： Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) tasks often leverage panoramic RGB and depth inputs to provide rich spatial cues for action planning, but these sensors can be costly or less accessible in real-world deployments. Recent approaches based on Vision-Language Action (VLA) models achieve strong results with monocular input, yet they still lag behind methods using panoramic RGB-D information. We present MonoDream, a lightweight VLA framework that enables monocular agents to learn a Unified Navigation Representation (UNR). This shared feature representation jointly aligns navigation-relevant visual semantics (e.g., global layout, depth, and future cues) and language-grounded action intent, enabling more reliable action prediction. MonoDream further introduces Latent Panoramic Dreaming (LPD) tasks to supervise the UNR, which train the model to predict latent features of panoramic RGB and depth observations at both current and future steps based on only monocular input. Experiments on multiple VLN benchmarks show that MonoDream consistently improves monocular navigation performance and significantly narrows the gap with panoramic-based agents. 🧠 核心术语库 [[统一导航表示 (UNR)]] [[潜在全景梦境 (LPD)]] [[视觉语言动作 (VLA)]] [[单目视觉 - 语言导航]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出轻量级 VLA 框架 MonoDream，构建统一导航表示（UNR）对齐视觉语义与语言动作意图，引入潜在全景梦境（LPD）任务，仅凭单目输入监督模型预测当前及未来步骤的全景 RGB-D 潜特征 💬 锐评 该方法试图用生成式“梦境”弥补感知缺失，但摘要未披露预测全景特征对下游导航任务的实际贡献权重，若潜空间与真实物理布局偏差过大，可能导致导航策略在复杂场景下失效 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Vision-Language Navigation: A Survey and Taxonomy
UAV_VLN.short_review: 模型未返回锐评
UAV_VLN.full_note: Vision-Language Navigation: A Survey and Taxonomy 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2108.11544v3 🧾 一句话总结： 模型未返回总结 📄 摘要： Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) tasks require an agent to follow human language instructions to navigate in previously unseen environments. This challenging field involving problems in natural language processing, computer vision, robotics, etc., has spawn many excellent works focusing on various VLN tasks. This paper provides a comprehensive survey and an insightful taxonomy of these tasks based on the different characteristics of language instructions in these tasks. Depending on whether the navigation instructions are given for once or multiple times, this paper divides the tasks into two categories, i.e., single-turn and multi-turn tasks. For single-turn tasks, we further subdivide them into goal-oriented and route-oriented based on whether the instructions designate a single goal location or specify a sequence of multiple locations. For multi-turn tasks, we subdivide them into passive and interactive tasks based on whether the agent is allowed to question the instruction or not. These tasks require different capabilities of the agent and entail various model designs. We identify progress made on the tasks and look into the limitations of existing VLN models and task settings. Finally, we discuss several open issues of VLN and point out some opportunities in the future, i.e., incorporating knowledge with VLN models and implementing them in the real physical world. 🧠 核心术语库 🔬 核心方法简述 模型未返回方法论 💬 锐评 模型未返回锐评 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: OpenVLN: Open-world Aerial Vision-Language Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 针对无人机特有挑战（数据获取难、航迹规划长）提出了针对性解法，规则辅助 RL 是解决冷启动数据匮乏的有效思路。然而，基于抽象摘要无法验证其‘开放世界’能力的泛化边界，且规则先验可能削弱 VLM 的语义推理上限，实际部署需警惕奖励函数的设计偏差。
UAV_VLN.full_note: OpenVLN: Open-world Aerial Vision-Language Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.06182v2 🧾 一句话总结： 该论文提出一种数据高效的无人机视觉语言导航框架，通过规则策略微调与长程价值规划，在 TravelUAV 基准上显著提升了复杂空域导航的成功率与路径质量。 📄 摘要： Vision-language models (VLMs) have been widely-applied in ground-based vision-language navigation (VLN). However, the vast complexity of outdoor aerial environments compounds data acquisition challenges and imposes long-horizon trajectory planning requirements on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), introducing novel complexities for aerial VLN. To address these challenges, we propose a data-efficient Open-world aerial Vision-Language Navigation (i.e., OpenVLN) framework, which could execute language-guided flight with limited data constraints and enhance long-horizon trajectory planning capabilities in complex aerial environments. Specifically, we reconfigure a reinforcement learning framework to optimize the VLM for UAV navigation tasks, which can efficiently fine-tune VLM by using rule-based policies under limited training data. Concurrently, we introduce a long-horizon planner for trajectory synthesis that dynamically generates precise UAV actions via value-based rewards. To the end, we conduct sufficient navigation experiments on the TravelUAV benchmark with dataset scaling across diverse reward settings. Our method demonstrates consistent performance gains of up to 4.34% in Success Rate, 6.19% in Oracle Success Rate, and 4.07% in Success weighted by Path Length over baseline methods, validating its deployment efficacy for long-horizon UAV navigation in complex aerial environments. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Open-world 空中视觉语言导航]] [[视觉语言模型 (VLM)]] [[规则策略微调]] [[长程轨迹规划]] [[值奖励机制]] [[TravelUAV 基准]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 OpenVLN 框架，通过重构强化学习框架优化 VLM，利用规则策略在有限数据下实现高效微调；同时引入基于价值奖励的长程规划器，动态合成精准无人机飞行轨迹以应对复杂户外环境。 💬 锐评 针对无人机特有挑战（数据获取难、航迹规划长）提出了针对性解法，规则辅助 RL 是解决冷启动数据匮乏的有效思路。然而，基于抽象摘要无法验证其‘开放世界’能力的泛化边界，且规则先验可能削弱 VLM 的语义推理上限，实际部署需警惕奖励函数的设计偏差。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Vision-Language Navigation with Energy-Based Policy
UAV_VLN.short_review: 摘要指出传统方法存在马尔可夫决策过程中的误差累积问题，提出用能量模型替代显式奖励工程或行为克隆，虽理论上简化为散度最小化，但未说明能量模型在离散动作空间下的具体优化手段及收敛成本
UAV_VLN.full_note: Vision-Language Navigation with Energy-Based Policy 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.14250v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该工作通过引入能量模型构建导航策略，从占据测度层面最小化与专家行为的分布差异，解决了传统VLM方法难以避免的策略分布失配与误差累积问题 📄 摘要： Vision-language navigation (VLN) requires an agent to execute actions following human instructions. Existing VLN models are optimized through expert demonstrations by supervised behavioural cloning or incorporating manual reward engineering. While straightforward, these efforts overlook the accumulation of errors in the Markov decision process, and struggle to match the distribution of the expert policy. Going beyond this, we propose an Energy-based Navigation Policy (ENP) to model the joint state-action distribution using an energy-based model. At each step, low energy values correspond to the state-action pairs that the expert is most likely to perform, and vice versa. Theoretically, the optimization objective is equivalent to minimizing the forward divergence between the occupancy measure of the expert and ours. Consequently, ENP learns to globally align with the expert policy by maximizing the likelihood of the actions and modeling the dynamics of the navigation states in a collaborative manner. With a variety of VLN architectures, ENP achieves promising performances on R2R, REVERIE, RxR, and R2R-CE, unleashing the power of existing VLN models. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Energy-Based Navigation Policy]] [[Occupancy Measure]] [[Forward Divergence]] [[Supervised Behavioral Cloning]] [[Markov Decision Process]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出能量导航策略(ENP)，利用能量模型建模状态 - 动作联合分布。通过将优化目标等价于最小化专家与代理占据测度的前向散度，使低能量对应专家高概率动作，以最大化动作似然并协同建模导航状态动态，实现全局对齐专家策略 💬 锐评 摘要指出传统方法存在马尔可夫决策过程中的误差累积问题，提出用能量模型替代显式奖励工程或行为克隆，虽理论上简化为散度最小化，但未说明能量模型在离散动作空间下的具体优化手段及收敛成本 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Active Test-time Vision-Language Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 依赖测试时外部交互反馈限制了在完全自主场景的部署可行性，且假设所选动作为最优的伪专家分布存在初始错误导致系统固化的风险。
UAV_VLN.full_note: Active Test-time Vision-Language Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.06630v1 🧾 一句话总结： 针对 VLN 离线训练模型在未知环境失效问题，利用测试时主动学习与混合熵优化机制实现了更稳健的自适应决策。 📄 摘要： Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) policies trained on offline datasets often exhibit degraded task performance when deployed in unfamiliar navigation environments at test time, where agents are typically evaluated without access to external interaction or feedback. Entropy minimization has emerged as a practical solution for reducing prediction uncertainty at test time; however, it can suffer from accumulated errors, as agents may become overconfident in incorrect actions without sufficient contextual grounding. To tackle these challenges, we introduce ATENA (Active TEst-time Navigation Agent), a test-time active learning framework that enables a practical human-robot interaction via episodic feedback on uncertain navigation outcomes. In particular, ATENA learns to increase certainty in successful episodes and decrease it in failed ones, improving uncertainty calibration. Here, we propose mixture entropy optimization, where entropy is obtained from a combination of the action and pseudo-expert distributions-a hypothetical action distribution assuming the agent's selected action to be optimal-controlling both prediction confidence and action preference. In addition, we propose a self-active learning strategy that enables an agent to evaluate its navigation outcomes based on confident predictions. As a result, the agent stays actively engaged throughout all iterations, leading to well-grounded and adaptive decision-making. Extensive evaluations on challenging VLN benchmarks-REVERIE, R2R, and R2R-CE-demonstrate that ATENA successfully overcomes distributional shifts at test time, outperforming the compared baseline methods across various settings. 🧠 核心术语库 [[测试时适应]] [[熵最小化]] [[主动学习]] [[不确定性校准]] [[混合熵优化]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 ATENA 测试时主动学习框架，通过人机交互的阶段性反馈校准不确定性；采用混合熵优化（结合动作与伪专家分布）控制预测置信度与动作偏好；实施基于高置信预测评估结果的自主动学习策略。 💬 锐评 依赖测试时外部交互反馈限制了在完全自主场景的部署可行性，且假设所选动作为最优的伪专家分布存在初始错误导致系统固化的风险。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Vision-Language Navigation with Continual Learning
UAV_VLN.short_review: 虽确立 VLNCL 新基准，但摘要未明确记忆回放机制在嵌入式设备上的实时性与计算开销，可能制约无人机低延迟决策；‘新环境’泛化边界与评估指标具体定义缺失，对复杂动态飞行环境的适应机理尚不清晰。
UAV_VLN.full_note: Vision-Language Navigation with Continual Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.02561v2 🧾 一句话总结： 通过引入持续学习与场景回放机制，解决了传统 VLN 智能体因训练数据局限导致的新环境部署性能下降及知识遗忘难题。 📄 摘要： Vision-language navigation (VLN) is a critical domain within embedded intelligence, requiring agents to navigate 3D environments based on natural language instructions. Traditional VLN research has focused on improving environmental understanding and decision accuracy. However, these approaches often exhibit a significant performance gap when agents are deployed in novel environments, mainly due to the limited diversity of training data. Expanding datasets to cover a broader range of environments is impractical and costly. We propose the Vision-Language Navigation with Continual Learning (VLNCL) paradigm to address this challenge. In this paradigm, agents incrementally learn new environments while retaining previously acquired knowledge. VLNCL enables agents to maintain an environmental memory and extract relevant knowledge, allowing rapid adaptation to new environments while preserving existing information. We introduce a novel dual-loop scenario replay method (Dual-SR) inspired by brain memory replay mechanisms integrated with VLN agents. This method facilitates consolidating past experiences and enhances generalization across new tasks. By utilizing a multi-scenario memory buffer, the agent efficiently organizes and replays task memories, thereby bolstering its ability to adapt quickly to new environments and mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Our work pioneers continual learning in VLN agents, introducing a novel experimental setup and evaluation metrics. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through extensive evaluations and establish a benchmark for the VLNCL paradigm. Comparative experiments with existing continual learning and VLN methods show significant improvements, achieving state-of-the-art performance in continual learning ability and highlighting the potential of our approach in enabling rapid adaptation while preserving prior knowledge. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Vision-Language Navigation (VLN)]] [[Continual Learning (持续学习)]] [[Catastrophic Forgetting (灾难性遗忘)]] [[Dual-loop scenario replay (Dual-SR)]] [[Multi-scenario memory buffer]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出视觉语言导航持续学习（VLNCL）范式，采用受脑记忆机制启发的双循环场景回放方法（Dual-SR），结合多场景记忆缓冲区组织并回放任务记忆，实现增量学习新环境同时保留既往知识，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。 💬 锐评 虽确立 VLNCL 新基准，但摘要未明确记忆回放机制在嵌入式设备上的实时性与计算开销，可能制约无人机低延迟决策；‘新环境’泛化边界与评估指标具体定义缺失，对复杂动态飞行环境的适应机理尚不清晰。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Cross-Lingual Vision-Language Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 创新性地扩展了VNN的语言覆盖范围，但需警惕零样本场景下文化差异对指令理解的影响；数据集的中文指令多样性及评估指标的全面性有待验证
UAV_VLN.full_note: Cross-Lingual Vision-Language Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/1910.11301v3 🧾 一句话总结： 通过构建首个面向跨语言导航的双语基准数据集，验证了单语言训练模型在零样本条件下支持多语言指令导航的可行性 📄 摘要： Commanding a robot to navigate with natural language instructions is a long-term goal for grounded language understanding and robotics. But the dominant language is English, according to previous studies on vision-language navigation (VLN). To go beyond English and serve people speaking different languages, we collect a bilingual Room-to-Room (BL-R2R) dataset, extending the original benchmark with new Chinese instructions. Based on this newly introduced dataset, we study how an agent can be trained on existing English instructions but navigate effectively with another language under a zero-shot learning scenario. Without any training data of the target language, our model shows competitive results even compared to a model with full access to the target language training data. Moreover, we investigate the transferring ability of our model when given a certain amount of target language training data. 🧠 核心术语库 [[零样本学习]] [[跨语言迁移]] [[视觉语言导航]] [[多语言基准测试]] 🔬 核心方法简述 构建BL-R2R双语数据集，基于英语指令训练模型实现零样本中文导航任务，评估不同目标语言数据量下的跨语言迁移能力 💬 锐评 创新性地扩展了VNN的语言覆盖范围，但需警惕零样本场景下文化差异对指令理解的影响；数据集的中文指令多样性及评估指标的全面性有待验证 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: PROSPECT: Unified Streaming Vision-Language Navigation via Semantic--Spatial Fusion and Latent Predictive Representation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 声称预测分支无推理开销，但未阐明巨型基础模型（CUT3R/SigLIP）的实时计算压力；潜在预测的监督依赖于冻结教师，可能限制在线适应新环境的灵活性；实证主要集中在 VLN-CE 及通用机器人，针对无人机视角的动态运动约束与抗干扰特性缺乏具体论述。
UAV_VLN.full_note: PROSPECT: Unified Streaming Vision-Language Navigation via Semantic--Spatial Fusion and Latent Predictive Representation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.03739v1 🧾 一句话总结： PROSPECT 通过语义空间融合与潜在预测机制，在 VLN-CE 基准上实现了具有长程鲁棒性的状态 SOTA 导航性能。 📄 摘要： Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced zero-shot end-to-end Vision-Language Navigation (VLN), yet robust navigation requires not only semantic understanding but also predictive modeling of environment dynamics and spatial structure. We propose PROSPECT, a unified streaming navigation agent that couples a streaming Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policy with latent predictive representation learning. PROSPECT uses CUT3R as a streaming 3D foundation spatial encoder to produce long-context, absolute-scale spatial features, and fuses them with SigLIP semantic features via cross-attention. During training, we introduce learnable stream query tokens that query the streaming context and predict next-step 2D and 3D latent features (rather than pixels or explicit modalities), supervised in the latent spaces of frozen SigLIP and CUT3R teachers. The predictive branch shapes internal representations without inference overhead. Experiments on VLN-CE benchmarks and real-robot deployment demonstrate state-of-the-art performance and improved long-horizon robustness under diverse lighting. We will release code for the community soon. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Streaming VLA Policy]] [[Latent Predictive Representation]] [[Semantic-Spatial Fusion]] [[Stream Query Tokens]] [[CUT3R]] [[SigLIP]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 PROSPECT 统一流式导航智能体，采用 CUT3R 作为流式 3D 空间编码器获取长上下文特征，结合 SigLIP 语义特征并通过交叉注意力融合；训练阶段引入可学习流查询令牌，在冻结的 SigLIP 和 CUT3R 教师模型的潜在空间中监督预测下一步 2D 和 3D 潜在特征，以此塑造表征且不加推理开销。 💬 锐评 声称预测分支无推理开销，但未阐明巨型基础模型（CUT3R/SigLIP）的实时计算压力；潜在预测的监督依赖于冻结教师，可能限制在线适应新环境的灵活性；实证主要集中在 VLN-CE 及通用机器人，针对无人机视角的动态运动约束与抗干扰特性缺乏具体论述。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Systematic Evaluation of Novel View Synthesis for Video Place Recognition
UAV_VLN.short_review: 该工作属于实证导向而非算法创新，核心价值在于量化了合成数据对 UAV-地面协同定位的边际效益；结论指出大规模添加时视图数量与类型的重要性高于视角变化幅度，为资源受限下的数据增强策略提供了明确依据，但评估限于静态数据库，缺乏动态实时性考量。
UAV_VLN.full_note: Systematic Evaluation of Novel View Synthesis for Video Place Recognition 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.05876v1 🧾 一句话总结： 证实了合成新视图能有效提升跨机器人视角的视频场景识别准确率，且特定条件下数据规模比视角跨度更具决定性。 📄 摘要： The generation of synthetic novel views has the potential to positively impact robot navigation in several ways. In image-based navigation, a novel overhead view generated from a scene taken by a ground robot could be used to guide an aerial robot to that location. In Video Place Recognition (VPR), novel views of ground locations from the air can be added that enable a UAV to identify places seen by the ground robot, and similarly, overhead views can be used to generate novel ground views.   This paper presents a systematic evaluation of synthetic novel views in VPR using five public VPR image databases and seven typical image similarity methods. We show that for small synthetic additions, novel views improve VPR recognition statistics. We find that for larger additions, the magnitude of viewpoint change is less important than the number of views added and the type of imagery in the dataset. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Novel View Synthesis]] [[Video Place Recognition]] [[跨视角检索]] [[协同导航]] 🔬 核心方法简述 选取五个公开 VPR 图像数据库与七种典型图像相似度算法，系统评估合成新视图（特别是空 - 地视角转换）在视频场景识别中的性能增益。 💬 锐评 该工作属于实证导向而非算法创新，核心价值在于量化了合成数据对 UAV-地面协同定位的边际效益；结论指出大规模添加时视图数量与类型的重要性高于视角变化幅度，为资源受限下的数据增强策略提供了明确依据，但评估限于静态数据库，缺乏动态实时性考量。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: History-Conditioned Spatio-Temporal Visual Token Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 基于预训练模型进行免微调剪枝虽大幅降低工程门槛，但核心逻辑依赖静态注意力分数判断导航相关性，摘要未明确极端裁剪比下的细粒度语义丢失边界；真机验证局限于四足机器人，对无人机高频动态场景的泛化能力尚待证实。
UAV_VLN.full_note: History-Conditioned Spatio-Temporal Visual Token Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06480v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该工作通过训练自由的时空 Token 剪枝技术有效解决了 VLA 模型在 VLN 中的推理延迟瓶颈，实现了高效且低延迟的真机指令跟随导航部署。 📄 摘要： Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) enables robots to follow natural-language instructions in visually grounded environments, serving as a key capability for embodied robotic systems. Recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated strong navigation performance, but their high computational cost introduces latency that limits real-time deployment. We propose a training-free spatio-temporal vision token pruning framework tailored to VLA-based VLN. We apply spatial token selection to the current view, alongside spatio-temporal compression for historical memories, enabling efficient long-horizon inference while reducing redundant computation. Leveraging attention-based token importance and query-guided spatio-temporal filtering, the proposed approach preserves navigation-relevant information without retraining or modifying pretrained models, allowing plug-and-play integration into existing VLA systems. Through experiments on standard VLN benchmarks, we confirm that our method significantly outperforms existing pruning strategies. It successfully preserves superior navigation accuracy under extreme pruning scenarios, all while maintaining the highly competitive inference efficiency. Real-world deployment on a Unitree Go2 quadruped robot further validates reliable and low-latency instruction-following navigation under practical robotic constraints. We hope this work helps bridge the gap between large-scale multimodal modeling and efficient, real-time embodied deployment in robotic navigation systems. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Vision-Language Navigation (VLN)]] [[Vision-Language-Action (VLA)]] [[Token Pruning]] [[Spatio-Temporal Compression]] [[Training-Free Optimization]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出面向 VLA 导航的训练自由时空视觉 Token 剪枝框架，结合当前视图的空间选点与历史记忆的时空压缩策略，利用注意力机制及查询引导筛选关键视觉信息，实现无需重训的即插即用集成。 💬 锐评 基于预训练模型进行免微调剪枝虽大幅降低工程门槛，但核心逻辑依赖静态注意力分数判断导航相关性，摘要未明确极端裁剪比下的细粒度语义丢失边界；真机验证局限于四足机器人，对无人机高频动态场景的泛化能力尚待证实。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: FreeFly-Thinking : Aligning Chain-of-Thought Reasoning with Continuous UAV Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 虽强调解决户外复杂场景黑盒问题，但抽象未披露链式思维在连续控制中的计算延迟及对实时性的影响；‘未见测试集’的泛化指标缺乏细节，且未涉及仿真环境到真实物理世界的域偏移（Sim2Real）挑战，实际落地效能存疑。
UAV_VLN.full_note: FreeFly-Thinking : Aligning Chain-of-Thought Reasoning with Continuous UAV Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07181v2 🧾 一句话总结： 通过融合链式思维推理与双阶段训练策略，在户外复杂场景中实现了具备可解释性且鲁棒的无人机视觉语言导航新范式。 📄 摘要： Vision-Language Navigation aims to enable agents to understand natural language instructions and carry out appropriate navigation actions in real-world environments. Most work focuses on indoor settings, with little research in complex outdoor scenes. Current UAV Vision-and-Language Navigation models typically act as black boxes without explicit reasoning. We introduce FreeFly-thinking, an end-to-end VLN framework that converts the UAV agent's egocentric images and language instructions into a series of actions, inspired by environment of urban architecture proposed by OpenFly. We first construct a UAV dataset for navigation task, and then performing natural language chain of thought. We adopt a two-stage training strategy: Supervised fine-tuning and Reinforcement fine-tuning. Experiments on unseen test demonstrate a strong performance, presenting robustness and efficiency in UAV navigation issue. 🧠 核心术语库 [[视觉语言导航]] [[无人机导航]] [[链式思维推理]] [[监督微调]] [[强化微调]] [[端到端框架]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 FreeFly-thinking 端到端框架，构建无人机专用数据集并基于 OpenFly 城市环境。采用两阶段训练策略（监督微调 + 强化微调），引入自然语言链式思考（CoT）机制，将自视角图像与语言指令转换为连续导航动作，解决黑盒推理问题。 💬 锐评 虽强调解决户外复杂场景黑盒问题，但抽象未披露链式思维在连续控制中的计算延迟及对实时性的影响；‘未见测试集’的泛化指标缺乏细节，且未涉及仿真环境到真实物理世界的域偏移（Sim2Real）挑战，实际落地效能存疑。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: ViSA-Enhanced Aerial VLN: A Visual-Spatial Reasoning Enhanced Framework for Aerial Vision-Language Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 声称相比全训练 SOTA 提升 70.3% 极具震撼力，表明免训练方法可能更有效，但也引发对 VLM 幻觉及空中特有物理约束（如高度、速度）建模不足的担忧，需审视其在真实飞行环境中的安全性。
UAV_VLN.full_note: ViSA-Enhanced Aerial VLN: A Visual-Spatial Reasoning Enhanced Framework for Aerial Vision-Language Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08007v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过免训练的结构化视觉空间推理框架，该方法有效突破了传统空中导航系统的空间理解瓶颈，展现了巨大的应用潜力。 📄 摘要： Existing aerial Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) methods predominantly adopt a detection-and-planning pipeline, which converts open-vocabulary detections into discrete textual scene graphs. These approaches are plagued by inadequate spatial reasoning capabilities and inherent linguistic ambiguities. To address these bottlenecks, we propose a Visual-Spatial Reasoning (ViSA) enhanced framework for aerial VLN. Specifically, a triple-phase collaborative architecture is designed to leverage structured visual prompting, enabling Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to perform direct reasoning on image planes without the need for additional training or complex intermediate representations. Comprehensive evaluations on the CityNav benchmark demonstrate that the ViSA-enhanced VLN achieves a 70.3\% improvement in success rate compared to the fully trained state-of-the-art (SOTA) method, elucidating its great potential as a backbone for aerial VLN systems. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Aerial VLN]] [[Visual-Spatial Reasoning (ViSA)]] [[Structured Visual Prompting]] [[Image Plane Reasoning]] 🔬 核心方法简述 构建三阶段协同的 ViSA 框架，采用结构化视觉提示技术，引导 VLM 直接在图像平面进行视觉 - 空间推理，摒弃了传统的检测转场景图流程且无需额外训练。 💬 锐评 声称相比全训练 SOTA 提升 70.3% 极具震撼力，表明免训练方法可能更有效，但也引发对 VLM 幻觉及空中特有物理约束（如高度、速度）建模不足的担忧，需审视其在真实飞行环境中的安全性。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Edged USLAM: Edge-Aware Event-Based SLAM with Learning-Based Depth Priors
UAV_VLN.short_review: 性能表现具有明显的场景依赖性，在高速激进场景下弱于纯事件方法；引入学习深度模块虽解决尺度问题，但增加了计算负担且依赖先验假设的准确性，未能证明在极端动态环境下的泛化能力
UAV_VLN.full_note: Edged USLAM: Edge-Aware Event-Based SLAM with Learning-Based Depth Priors 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08150v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过融合边缘感知事件处理与学习深度先验，为结构化和低光照 UAV 导航提供了兼具稳定性与抗漂移能力的混合定位解决方案 📄 摘要： Conventional visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms often fail under rapid motion, low illumination, or abrupt lighting transitions due to motion blur and limited dynamic range. Event cameras mitigate these issues with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range (HDR), but their sparse, asynchronous outputs complicate feature extraction and integration with other sensors; e.g. inertial measurement units (IMUs) and standard cameras. We present Edged USLAM, a hybrid visual-inertial system that extends Ultimate SLAM (USLAM) with an edge-aware front-end and a lightweight depth module. The frontend enhances event frames for robust feature tracking and nonlinear motion compensation, while the depth module provides coarse, region-of-interest (ROI)-based scene depth to improve motion compensation and scale consistency. Evaluations across public benchmarks and real-world unmanned air vehicle (UAV) flights demonstrate that performance varies significantly by scenario. For instance, event-only methods like point-line event-based visual-inertial odometry (PL-EVIO) or learning-based pipelines such as deep event-based visual odometry (DEVO) excel in highly aggressive or extreme HDR conditions. In contrast, Edged USLAM provides superior stability and minimal drift in slow or structured trajectories, ensuring consistently accurate localization on real flights under challenging illumination. These findings highlight the complementary strengths of event-only, learning-based, and hybrid approaches, while positioning Edged USLAM as a robust solution for diverse aerial navigation tasks. 🧠 核心术语库 [[事件相机]] [[混合视觉惯性 SLAM]] [[边缘感知前端]] [[学习深度先验]] [[UAV 飞行验证]] 🔬 核心方法简述 扩展终极 SLAM(USLAM) 构建混合视觉惯性系统，采用边缘感知前端增强事件帧特征跟踪与非线性运动补偿，集成轻量级学习深度模块提供 ROI 区域深度先验以优化尺度一致性与补偿效果 💬 锐评 性能表现具有明显的场景依赖性，在高速激进场景下弱于纯事件方法；引入学习深度模块虽解决尺度问题，但增加了计算负担且依赖先验假设的准确性，未能证明在极端动态环境下的泛化能力 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Fly, Track, Land: Infrastructure-less Magnetic Localization for Heterogeneous UAV-UGV Teaming
UAV_VLN.short_review: 摘要未披露磁环境干扰抑制策略及系统初始收敛机制；单线圈设计可能导致信号强度受限，依赖'暖启动'求解器意味着对连续状态保持敏感；实验仅针对特定四足狗场景，未见对不同载体或复杂电磁环境下的泛化评估。
UAV_VLN.full_note: Fly, Track, Land: Infrastructure-less Magnetic Localization for Heterogeneous UAV-UGV Teaming 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08926v1 🧾 一句话总结： 提出一种无需外部设施的磁感应定位系统，实现了无人机对移动地面机器人在动态场景下的厘米级精度自主追踪与降落。 📄 摘要： We present a complete infrastructure-less magneto-inductive (MI) localization system enabling a lightweight UAV to autonomously hover, track, and land with centimeter precision on a mobile quadruped robot acting as a dynamic docking pad. This work advances the vision of heterogeneous robot collaboration, where ultra-lightweight flying robots serve as mobile perception agents for ground-based Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs). By extending the sensing horizon and providing complementary viewpoints, the UAVs enhance exploration efficiency and improve the quality of data collection in large-scale, unknown environments. The proposed system aims to complements traditional localization modalities with a compact, embedded, and infrastructure-less magnetic sensing approach, providing accurate short-range relative positioning to bridge the gap between coarse navigation and precise UAV docking. A single lightweight receive coil and a fully embedded estimation pipeline on the UAV deliver 20 Hz relative pose estimates in the UGV's frame, achieving a 3D position root-mean-square error (RMSE) of 5 cm. The system uses real-time estimation and a warm-started solver to estimate the 3D position, which is then fused with inertial and optical-flow measurements in the onboard extended Kalman filter. Real-world experiments validate the effectiveness of the framework, demonstrating significant improvements in UAV--UGV teaming in infrastructure-less scenarios compared to state-of-the-art methods, requiring no external anchors or global positioning. In dynamic scenarios, the UAV tracks and docks with a moving UGV while maintaining a 7.2 cm RMSE and achieving successful autonomous landings. 🧠 核心术语库 [[基础设施无关定位]] [[磁感应（MI）传感]] [[异构机器人协同]] [[动态自主降落]] [[多源信息融合]] 🔬 核心方法简述 采用单轻量级接收线圈实现磁感应（MI）定位，结合实时估计算法与在线扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF），融合惯性、光流数据，在无外部设施下解算无人机相对于移动无人车的三维位姿。 💬 锐评 摘要未披露磁环境干扰抑制策略及系统初始收敛机制；单线圈设计可能导致信号强度受限，依赖'暖启动'求解器意味着对连续状态保持敏感；实验仅针对特定四足狗场景，未见对不同载体或复杂电磁环境下的泛化评估。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: SPAN-Nav: Generalized Spatial Awareness for Versatile Vision-Language Navigation
UAV_VLN.short_review: 虽通过大规模数据与单token设计提升效率，但未明确说明极端动态环境中的实时性保障，且4.2M标注依赖性强可能限制长尾场景覆盖
UAV_VLN.full_note: SPAN-Nav: Generalized Spatial Awareness for Versatile Vision-Language Navigation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.09163v1 🧾 一句话总结： 构建首个融合通用3D空间感知与VLN的端到端框架，突破复杂场景中空间认知缺失瓶颈并实现跨任务泛化 📄 摘要： Recent embodied navigation approaches leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate strong generalization in versatile Vision-Language Navigation (VLN). However, reliable path planning in complex environments remains challenging due to insufficient spatial awareness. In this work, we introduce SPAN-Nav, an end-to-end foundation model designed to infuse embodied navigation with universal 3D spatial awareness using RGB video streams. SPAN-Nav extracts spatial priors across diverse scenes through an occupancy prediction task on extensive indoor and outdoor environments. To mitigate the computational burden, we introduce a compact representation for spatial priors, finding that a single token is sufficient to encapsulate the coarse-grained cues essential for navigation tasks. Furthermore, inspired by the Chain-of-Thought (CoT) mechanism, SPAN-Nav utilizes this single spatial token to explicitly inject spatial cues into action reasoning through an end-to end framework. Leveraging multi-task co-training, SPAN-Nav captures task-adaptive cues from generalized spatial priors, enabling robust spatial awareness to generalize even to the task lacking explicit spatial supervision. To support comprehensive spatial learning, we present a massive dataset of 4.2 million occupancy annotations that covers both indoor and outdoor scenes across multi-type navigation tasks. SPAN-Nav achieves state-of-the-art performance across three benchmarks spanning diverse scenarios and varied navigation tasks. Finally, real-world experiments validate the robust generalization and practical reliability of our approach across complex physical scenarios. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Vision-Language Models (VLMs)]] [[occupancy prediction]] [[Chain-ofThought (CoT) mechanism]] [[multi-task co-training]] [[spatial priors]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出端到端基础模型SPAN-Nav，通过occupancy预测任务学习跨场景空间先验，采用单token压缩表示空间线索，结合Chain-of-Thought机制将空间认知注入动作推理，并通过多任务联合训练实现无需显式空间监督的泛化能力 💬 锐评 虽通过大规模数据与单token设计提升效率，但未明确说明极端动态环境中的实时性保障，且4.2M标注依赖性强可能限制长尾场景覆盖 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: Let's Reward Step-by-Step: Step-Aware Contrastive Alignment for Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments
UAV_VLN.short_review: 虽在理论层面实现细粒度监督提取，但实际部署需考量实时性与计算成本；对复杂环境泛化能力及多模态交互深度仍有探索空间
UAV_VLN.full_note: Let's Reward Step-by-Step: Step-Aware Contrastive Alignment for Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.09740v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过动态分组优化与步骤级信号分配，显著提升连续环境中视觉语言导航任务的训练稳定性和错误恢复能力 📄 摘要： Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) requires agents to learn complex reasoning from long-horizon human interactions. While Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have driven recent progress, current training paradigms struggle to balance generalization capability, error recovery and training stability. Specifically, (i) policies derived from SFT suffer from compounding errors, struggling to recover from out-of-distribution states, and (ii) Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) methods e.g. GRPO are bottlenecked by sparse outcome rewards. Their binary feedback fails to assign credit to individual steps, leading to gradient signal collapse in failure dominant batches. To address these challenges, we introduce Step-Aware Contrastive Alignment (SACA), a framework designed to extract dense supervision from imperfect trajectories. At its core, the Perception-Grounded Step-Aware auditor evaluates progress step-by-step, disentangling failed trajectories into valid prefixes and exact divergence points. Leveraging these signals, Scenario-Conditioned Group Construction mechanism dynamically routes batches to specialized resampling and optimization strategies. Extensive experiments on VLN-CE benchmarks demonstrate that SACA achieves state-of-the-art performance. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Step-Aware Contrastive Alignment(SACA)]] [[Perception-Grounded Step-Aware auditor]] [[Scenario-Conditioned Group Construction mechanism]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出SACA框架，通过感知地面步骤评估器分解轨迹为有效前缀与分歧点，结合场景条件化组构建机制动态优化策略，解决误差累积和稀疏奖励问题 💬 锐评 虽在理论层面实现细粒度监督提取，但实际部署需考量实时性与计算成本；对复杂环境泛化能力及多模态交互深度仍有探索空间 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

UAV_VLN.title: OnFly: Onboard Zero-Shot Aerial Vision-Language Navigation toward Safety and Efficiency
UAV_VLN.short_review: 该方法直面 VLM 决策不稳定及长程监控不可靠的痛点，通过架构解耦与几何语义融合重构导航流程，仿真实验显示成功率从 26.4% 显著跃升至 67.8%。其核心价值在于实现了真正的'全机载实时部署'可行性验证。但'实时性'高度依赖端侧算力与深度估计精度，在极端光照或动态遮挡下的泛化鲁棒性仍需谨慎评估，且未提供具体硬件配置以佐证算力效率。
UAV_VLN.full_note: OnFly: Onboard Zero-Shot Aerial Vision-Language Navigation toward Safety and Efficiency 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： UAV_VLN 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.10682v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该研究通过架构解耦与几何语义融合验证，解决了无人机零样本视觉语言导航中安全性与实时性的冲突，实现了仿真任务成功率的显著提升与真机部署验证。 📄 摘要： Aerial vision-language navigation (AVLN) enables UAVs to follow natural-language instructions in complex 3D environments. However, existing zero-shot AVLN methods often suffer from unstable single-stream Vision-Language Model decision-making, unreliable long-horizon progress monitoring, and a trade-off between safety and efficiency. We propose OnFly, a fully onboard, real-time framework for zero-shot AVLN. OnFly adopts a shared-perception dual-agent architecture that decouples high-frequency target generation from low-frequency progress monitoring, thereby stabilizing decision-making. It further employs a hybrid keyframe-recent-frame memory to preserve global trajectory context while maintaining KV-cache prefix stability, enabling reliable long-horizon monitoring with termination and recovery signals. In addition, a semantic-geometric verifier refines VLM-predicted targets for instruction consistency and geometric safety using VLM features and depth cues, while a receding-horizon planner generates optimized collision-free trajectories under geometric safety constraints, improving both safety and efficiency. In simulation, OnFly improves task success from 26.4% to 67.8%, compared with the strongest state-of-the-art baseline, while fully onboard real-world flights validate its feasibility for real-time deployment. The code will be released at https://github.com/Robotics-STAR-Lab/OnFly 🧠 核心术语库 [[Aerial Vision-Language Navigation (AVLN)]] [[Zero-Shot Learning]] [[Dual-agent Architecture]] [[Semi-Geometric Verifier]] [[Receding-Horizon Planner]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 OnFly 框架，采用共享感知双智能体架构解耦高频目标生成与低频进度监控；利用混合关键帧 - 近期帧记忆保持轨迹上下文与 KV-cache 稳定；通过语义几何验证器结合深度线索修正 VLM 预测；结合后退视界规划器在几何约束下生成无碰撞轨迹。 💬 锐评 该方法直面 VLM 决策不稳定及长程监控不可靠的痛点，通过架构解耦与几何语义融合重构导航流程，仿真实验显示成功率从 26.4% 显著跃升至 67.8%。其核心价值在于实现了真正的'全机载实时部署'可行性验证。但'实时性'高度依赖端侧算力与深度估计精度，在极端光照或动态遮挡下的泛化鲁棒性仍需谨慎评估，且未提供具体硬件配置以佐证算力效率。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。
